Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Payment Handled in cases that include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time for Payment Handled in process variants that contain at least one rejection by PRE_APPROVER compared to variants with no such rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total time between Request Payment and Payment Handled grouped by whether the case previously experienced Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Minimum time it takes Payment Handled to be done after Request Payment in traces that passed through Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER without rejection
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time until Payment Handled is performed in the most frequent variant (Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE → Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION → Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR → Request Payment → Payment Handled)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Payment Handled in variants where Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurred more than once
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time from Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR to Payment Handled in cases that originally included a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average waiting time to Payment Handled after Request Payment in cases that followed the path including Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total resolution time of Payment Handled in domestic reimbursement claims (inferred from absence of pre-approval steps) versus those requiring full approval chain
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Minimum time between Request Payment and Payment Handled in variants that bypassed budget owner approval (e.g., supervisor and budget owner are the same person, as described in the log description)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time it takes Payment Handled after Request Payment in cases that were never rejected versus cases that experienced any rejection, with specific focus on Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time of Payment Handled relative to the initial submission date in variants that required director approval (implied by extended approval chains in the variant list)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total time from Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER to Payment Handled across all re-submitted cases that eventually reached completion
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time for Payment Handled in variants that include Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE prior to submission, compared to those that do not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Payment Handled in successful paths that avoided rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'
